reviews.comment:
Realmente muy fácil acceso, la ubicación es ideal, los precios del combustible son quasi standard para ACA. Le doy una estrella menos por los precios realmente altos de cafetería, que es lo que más se consume en una parada para reabastecer combustible.

(Translated by Google)
It's really easy to get to, the location is ideal, and fuel prices are pretty standard for ACA. I'm giving it one star less because of the really high prices at the cafeteria, which is what you spend most of your time on when you stop to refuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3904387536841865428/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzdWZDTk5REAE
